entity.summary: Multichain perpetual decentralized exchange combining self-custodial derivatives trading with yield-bearing DUSD collateral and permissionless market creation across BNB Chain and Solana.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies StandX as a live mainnet perpetual DEX across BNB Chain and Solana, with wallet-connected trading, REST and WebSocket APIs, DUSD yield-bearing margin, and permissionless market infrastructure. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, TVL, and open interest. No exact full-entity launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: About StandX
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies StandX as a live mainnet perpetual DEX across BNB Chain and Solana, powered by yield-bearing DUSD and permissionless market infrastructure.

evidence.title: StandX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL and open interest, supporting active classification.
